title: TlsActivation
description: A TLS activation that enables TLS traffic termination for a specific domain using a custom certificate and configuration.

id.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the TLS activation.

created_at.description: The date and time the activation was created.

tls_certificate.description: The TLS certificate used for the activation.

tls_configuration.description: The TLS configuration used for the activation.

tls_domain.description: The domain the activation is for.
